# Themes

This folder catalogs the major themes, technologies, and conceptual frameworks that Zecharia Sitchin identified in the Anunnaki narrative. These themes span genetics, warfare, timekeeping, navigation, and the sacred sciences.

## Core Themes

| Theme | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| [Genetic Engineering](genetic-engineering.md) | The creation of humanity through DNA manipulation |
| [Nuclear Weapons](nuclear-weapons.md) | The nuclear weapons used by the Anunnaki |
| [Calendar](calendar.md) | The timekeeping systems established by the Anunnaki |
| [Spaceports](spaceports.md) | The spaceport facilities on Earth |
| [Monatomic Gold](monatomic-gold.md) | The special gold the Anunnaki sought |
| [Navigation Beacons](navigation-beacons.md) | The beacon system for spacecraft |
| [Sacred Numbers](sacred-numbers.md) | Sacred numbers encoding astronomical knowledge |
| [Precession](precession.md) | The precessional cycle of Earth's axis |
| [Pyramids](pyramids.md) | The pyramids as navigation beacons |
| [Mixed Marriages](mixed-marriages.md) | Interbreeding between Anunnaki and humans |
| [Vimanas And Aircraft](vimanas-and-aircraft.md) | Anunnaki flying vehicles and aircraft |

## Interconnections

These themes are deeply interconnected. For instance:

- [Genetic Engineering](genetic-engineering.md) → [Mixed Marriages](mixed-marriages.md) (genetic manipulation and interbreeding)
- [Spaceports](spaceports.md) → [Navigation Beacons](navigation-beacons.md) → [Pyramids](pyramids.md) (space technology infrastructure)
- [Calendar](calendar.md) → [Precession](precession.md) → [Sacred Numbers](sacred-numbers.md) (time and mathematics)
- [Nuclear Weapons](nuclear-weapons.md) → [Nuclear Destruction](../quotes/nuclear-destruction.md) (warfare and destruction)
- [Monatomic Gold](monatomic-gold.md) → [Gold Mining](../timeline/gold-mining.md) (the purpose of the Anunnaki mission)

---

*"The themes of the ancient texts are not separate — they form a single coherent narrative of science, technology, and history."*
